title: Senior Software Engineer I - AI
company_focus:
CDMO services for genomic medicine and biotechnology, part
of Danaher corporation
description:
Bring more to life.



Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real
difference within life sciences, diagnostics and
biotechnology?



At Aldevron, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our
work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment
to innovate for tangible impact.



You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your
unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system
of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact –
innovating at the speed of life.



At Aldevron, we deliver world-class CDMO services that
accelerate the development of groundbreaking therapies. Our
mission is to be the engine of innovation for genomic
medicine pioneers. As a member of our team, you’ll help
bring life-changing innovations to life—impacting millions
around the world. We bring together deep scientific
expertise, an unwavering commitment to quality, and a
collaborative spirit to drive progress. Whether you're
launching your career or bringing years of experience, we
value the unique perspective you bring. Join us and become
part of a mission-driven team advancing science and
unlocking human potential—one discovery at a time.



Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes
everything possible.



The AI Software Engineer, Sr is responsible for building
custom applications and tools to achieve business outcomes.
They leverage their understanding of
technical solutions to optimize

 processes and improve the organizational productivity and
efficiency.



This position reports to the Director, AI & Data Engineering
and is part of the AI & Data Team located in Bengaluru,
India and will be an on-site role.



In this role, you will have the opportunity to:

- Develop, test, and deploy custom Python applications for
  predictive analytics, process automation, and data-driven
  decision support to solve real-world problems in biotech

- Design, implement, and optimize low-level code for training
  and fine-tuning RAG models using OpenAI LLMs and related
  frameworks

- Integrate AI models with enterprise data sources, ensuring
  robust, scalable, and secure solutions

- Design, code, and test custom applications and scripts using
  industry-standard development systems and practices

- Deliver functionality according to technical
  specifications to achieve expected business outcomes

The essential requirements of the job include:

- Experience with programming languages: Python ,  JavaScript,
  Java, C# .NET

- Experience with CI/CD and DevOps practices, including
  automated tools for build, test, and deployment (e.g.,
  Azure DevOps)

- Strong experience in Agile Software Development, with a
  track record of delivering high-quality software in
  iterative cycles

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Secure Code Development



It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience
in:

- Strong understanding of data security, compliance, and
  governance frameworks

- Experience with Azure Databricks, Datalakes & equivalent SQL
  database systems

- Scrum Leadership, experience and ability to mentor teams on
  Agile principles





Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the
real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We
partner with customers across the globe to help them solve
their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that
bring the power of science to life.

For more information, visit www.danaher.com.
responsibilities: Develop, test, and deploy custom Python applications for predictive analytics, process automation, and data-driven decision support
Design, implement, and optimize low-level code for training and fine-tuning RAG models using OpenAI LLMs and related frameworks
Integrate AI models with enterprise data sources, ensuring robust, scalable, and secure solutions
Design, code, and test custom applications and scripts using industry-standard development systems and practices
Deliver functionality according to technical specifications to achieve expected business outcomes
Optimize processes and improve organizational productivity and efficiency through technical solutions
use_cases: Process automation in life sciences and diagnostics
RAG-based applications for enterprise knowledge retrieval
Biotech and genomic medicine workflow optimization
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves designing, implementing, and optimizing
code for training and fine-tuning RAG models using OpenAI
LLMs, which is direct hands-on work with GenAI systems. The
position also develops custom Python applications
integrating AI models with enterprise data sources, clearly
placing it in the ai-first category.
